entries.name: shifter - spincycle c
entries.author: shifter
entries.technical_notes: A bilateral symmetric warp field generates fluid, smoky structures reminiscent of Geiss's reaction-diffusion lineage. Frame feedback via sampler_main with a low decay rate produces persistent, painterly trails that swell in response to the synthetic test signal's bass kicks. High-frequency transients modulate concentric ripple patterns and fine, sparkling particle-like custom waves.

entries.name: phat + Eo.S. - TesellatingFractal_Mix3
entries.author: phat + Eo.S.
entries.technical_notes: A logarithmic spiral feedback loop is created via zoom and rotation in the per-pixel warp equations, feeding back into sampler_main with a low decay rate to form persistent, organic structures. Wireframe custom shapes are drawn along the spiral path, flickering in response to treble spikes in the synthetic test signal. The overall zoom and rotation speed are modulated dynamically by the synthetic kick.

entries.name: phat + Eo.S. - TesellatingFractal_Mix
entries.author: phat + Eo.S.
entries.technical_notes: A logarithmic spiral warp field drives continuous zooming and rotation, while frame feedback through sampler_main creates organic, persistent trails. Custom waves rendered as wireframe spheres trace a parametric spiral path modulated by q-variables. The synthetic test signal's bass pulses modulate the overall zoom scale, while treble transients trigger sharp, high-frequency deformations in the feedback loop.

entries.name: phat + Eo.S. - 2ct2V5
entries.author: phat + Eo.S.
entries.technical_notes: A logarithmic spiral feedback loop via sampler_main creates an infinite tunnel, with low decay preserving painterly, swirling trails. The per-pixel warp shader applies a high-frequency liquid advection field driven by the mid-range of the test signal. Custom wireframe shapes are rendered dynamically, scaling and jumping in response to the synthetic kick.

entries.name: nil - Vortex of Vortices
entries.author: nil
entries.technical_notes: A high-key, low-decay feedback loop via sampler_main creates persistent, smoky, ribbon-like trails resembling fluid flow. A complex per-pixel warp field drives a swirling vortex that shifts dynamically in response to the synthetic kick of the test signal. Delicate custom waves render thin, high-frequency lines that flicker in response to treble transients, while subtle color shifts modulate over time.

entries.name: mstress - Scattered gravity (Smoked mix)
entries.author: mstress
entries.technical_notes: A swirling, fluid cauldron effect is generated via persistent frame feedback in sampler_main combined with a complex per-pixel warp field. Custom shapes are injected as discrete bursts modulated by the synthetic kick, leaving highly distorted, painterly trails. The organic green palette is punctured by high-contrast chromatic flares and feedback-stretched artifacts.

entries.name: mstress - Cleaning a path - Painterly Crossfire
entries.author: mstress
entries.technical_notes: Per-pixel warp shader applies complex logarithmic spiral transformations, creating a fluid, fractal-like structure. Frame feedback through sampler_main with a low decay rate preserves painterly pastel stripes that swirl continuously. The synthetic test signal's bass kicks drive rapid zoom modulations and coordinate rotations, while treble transients introduce subtle high-frequency edge jitter.

entries.name: fiShbRaiN - the adventures of prismo jenkins
entries.author: fiShbRaiN
entries.technical_notes: A kaleidoscopic domain repetition tiles a central starburst pattern, driven by a high-frequency particle system that reacts to the treble of the synthetic test signal. Beat-gated bursts trigger intense full-screen flashes and scale jumps, utilizing sampler_blur2 in the composite shader to create a soft bloom effect. Frame feedback through sampler_main maintains a subtle trailing texture behind the swirling spiral arms.

entries.name: amandio c - new life
entries.author: amandio c
entries.technical_notes: A complex radial warp field combined with domain repetition creates a recursive, sunflower-like structure. Custom waves are modulated by the test signal's bass and treble to form writhing, tentacle-like structures radiating from a central core. Frame feedback via sampler_main coupled with a high-brightness composite shader produces a shimmering, metallic golden-bronze texture that reacts dynamically to the audio loop.

entries.name: Vovan + Geiss - Bass With Flover (Feedback Mix) 3
entries.author: Vovan + Geiss
entries.technical_notes: Concentric circular custom_wave elements act as polar-mapped oscilloscopes, modulated by treble frequencies of the synthetic test signal. The deep, spiraling tunnel is generated via a radial zoom and spiral warp in the per-pixel equations, feeding back through sampler_main with a moderate decay rate to create persistent golden-brown trails. The synthetic kick triggers sudden expansions of the warp field, driving the radial distortion and brightness.

entries.name: Vovan + Geiss - Bass With Flover (Feedback Mix) 2
entries.author: Vovan + Geiss
entries.technical_notes: A concentric spiral custom wave is modulated into a deep tunnel structure, with frame feedback in sampler_main creating persistent decaying trails. The synthetic kick in the test signal triggers sudden radial warp expansions and drives a crimson-to-gold color shift in the center. High-frequency transients in the audio loop introduce sharp jitter along the wave vertices.

entries.name: Mig_061
entries.technical_notes: Per-pixel warp shader creates a layered, sheared advection pattern reminiscent of glacial shelves or thick paint strokes. Multiple custom_wave elements are rendered as thin, high-frequency lines modulated by the treble bands of the test signal. Frame feedback through sampler_main with a low decay rate preserves the sheared structures, while sudden color transitions are gated by the synthetic kick drum.

entries.name: Unchained - elite vectronics
entries.author: Unchained
entries.technical_notes: A central custom_wave renders a chaotic oscilloscope trace reacting dynamically to the synthetic test signal. Per-pixel warp equations generate a fluid, metallic ripple effect in the background, while motion vectors create a rain-like grid of falling lines. Low decay in sampler_main preserves the scribbled trails, blending them into a smoky texture.

entries.name: Telek - Slow Thing (Spiderman Mix)

A blue custom wave oscillates in the foreground, modulated by high-frequency components of the test signal.

entries.name: Telek - Sine Wave

The background features a dense, vertical grid-like texture warped by a per-pixel warp shader that creates folding, fabric-like distortions. Feedback loop through sampler_main with a low decay rate maintains the persistent scanline structure, while a slow hue cycle shifts the palette from olive-yellow to deep crimson.

entries.name: Rovastar - Tripmaker

The per-pixel warp shader applies a radial zoom and rotational displacement modulated by the synthetic kick's bass attenuated, while a continuous hue cycle rotates the palette from cool teals to vibrant magentas.

High-frequency custom waves trace the contours of the warp field, creating fine, ripple-like interference patterns. Frame feedback through sampler_main with a tuned decay rate produces smooth, fluid-like black and white plumes that contrast with the vibrant green hue-cycled background.

High-frequency beat detection gates sudden transitions between distinct color palettes (emerald green, deep magenta, and grayscale) and drives a bilateral warp_field. Persistent frame feedback through sampler_main combined with a fluid advection warp creates organic, ink-in-water decay trails.

entries.name: Rovastar + Telek - Altars of Madness (Rolling Oceans Mix)
entries.author: Rovastar + Telek

Frame feedback through sampler_main with a low decay rate maintains persistent, painterly teal trails, while a highly reactive custom wave rendered in bright white traces the high-frequency transients of the synthetic test signal. The background features a subtle grid of motion vectors modulated by the synthetic kick.

entries.name: Rovastar + Rocke - Sugar Spun Sister

High frame feedback through sampler_main with a moderate decay rate preserves the calligraphic, swirling trails of the central emitter.

The synthetic kick triggers sudden, beat-gated shifts in the hue cycle alongside rapid changes in zoom and rotation. A dense grid of motion vectors rendered as fine dots modulates in response to treble frequencies in the test signal.

entries.name: Rovastar & Rocke - Sugar Spun Sister

The sphere's radius and noise deformation amplitude are modulated by the bass frequencies of the music, causing it to expand and pulse outward during kick events. The soft bloom on the rim suggests a composite shader utilizing a blur pyramid to create the glowing halo.

A subtle starfield particle system drifts in the background, while a low-decay feedback loop via sampler_main creates soft, smoky trails of the geometric elements.

entries.name: fiShbRaiN - a quiet death
entries.author: fiShbRaiN
entries.technical_notes: A central neon-magenta bloom is driven by the bass of the test signal, reflecting across a horizontal mirror plane to create a wet-floor effect. Vertical digital rain elements are rendered using custom waves or a structured warp field, with brightness modulated by treble frequencies. Frame feedback through sampler_main creates persistent vertical trails and a soft, glowing atmosphere.

entries.name: fed - slowfast 1.1
entries.author: fed
entries.technical_notes: A custom wave draws a minimalist circular oscilloscope combined with a rotating radial wedge. The perimeter of the circle deforms dynamically in response to the synthetic test signal, with high-frequency ripples driven by treble and larger structural deflections reacting to the synthetic kick. The color of the wave cycles through a vibrant palette over time.

entries.name: Unchained - Unified Drag 2
entries.author: Unchained
entries.technical_notes: A central custom wave scribble reacts dynamically to treble in the synthetic test signal. Strong zoom and rotation in the per-frame equations feed into sampler_main, generating a persistent concentric tunnel structure. Beat-gated triggers on the synthetic kick drive rapid hue cycling and high-contrast white-out flashes that decay quickly.

entries.name: Unchained - Cranked On Failure
entries.author: Unchained
entries.technical_notes: A central custom wave draws high-frequency scribbles that spiral outward via a rotational warp field. Nested rectangular borders are generated dynamically, scaling and flashing in response to bass transients in the synthetic test signal. Frame feedback through sampler_main with moderate decay preserves the sharp geometric lines, creating a chaotic, strobing tunnel effect.

entries.name: Unchained - All You Can Eat
entries.author: Unchained
entries.technical_notes: A central custom wave draws a chaotic, high-frequency white scribble that reacts to the treble of the test signal. High-frequency feedback through sampler_main combined with a low decay rate produces a dense, scratchy matrix of persistent trails. The warp field is heavily modulated by the synthetic kick, triggering rapid zoom bursts and radial distortions.

entries.name: Rozzor & StudioMusic - Vertigyny (Geiss Shape Mod)
entries.author: Rozzor & StudioMusic
entries.technical_notes: Per-pixel warp shader creates a dynamic spiral and zoom effect, while feedback through sampler_main with high decay rates produces sharp, geometric trails. A central custom wave reacts directly to the treble of the test signal, while sudden palette shifts and geometry rotations are gated by bass-attenuated beat detection. Moiré-like interference patterns emerge from high-frequency coordinate manipulation in the composite shader.

entries.name: Rovastar - VooV's Movement (After Dark Mix)
entries.author: Rovastar
entries.technical_notes: Per-pixel warp shader creates a complex fluid advection field resembling reaction-diffusion, driven by a low decay rate in sampler_main to produce persistent, swirling trails. A central custom_wave acts as an oscilloscope, reacting dynamically to the treble and mid-range frequencies of the synthetic test signal. The global color palette undergoes a continuous hue_cycle, transitioning from deep blues and purples to vibrant magentas and warm ochres.

entries.name: Rovastar - VooV's Movement (After Dark Mix) - Painterly
entries.author: Rovastar
entries.technical_notes: Two horizontal custom_wave elements display high-frequency audio waveforms across the center, shifting in color via a continuous hue_cycle. The background utilizes a fluid per-pixel warp_field combined with a low decay rate in sampler_main feedback to create a painterly, organic texture reminiscent of Geiss's reaction-diffusion lineage. The warp dynamics and zoom are modulated by the bass attenuated from the synthetic test signal, while the wave spikes trace the treble.

entries.name: Rovastar - Fractopia (Upspoken Mix)_Phat_Speak_When_Spoken_2
entries.author: Rovastar
entries.technical_notes: Per-pixel warp shader creates a swirling, organic reaction-diffusion tunnel, sampling previous frames via sampler_main with high zoom and rotation. Custom waves form a central wireframe core that reacts dynamically to the treble of the test signal. Intense audio gating on the synthetic kick triggers instant palette shifts and zoom bursts, while sampler_blur1 softens the boundaries to produce a glowing, cell-like texture.

entries.name: Rovastar - Fractopia (Upspoken Mix)
entries.author: Rovastar
entries.technical_notes: A recursive scalloped tunnel is generated via zoom and rotation feedback loops sampled through sampler_main. High-contrast thresholding and edge detection in the composite shader render bold, comic-book-style black outlines over flat color fields. Rapid palette swaps and geometric state jumps are heavily driven by audio gating, reacting dynamically to the synthetic kick and transients within the test signal.

entries.name: Rovastar + Idiot24-7 - Balk Acid
entries.author: Rovastar + Idiot24-7
entries.technical_notes: A high-contrast composite shader clamps the center of a radial grid to pure white, triggered by beat-gated bursts from the synthetic kick of the test signal. The grid itself undergoes extreme per-pixel warp deformation, creating moiré interference patterns that alternate rapidly between green and purple hues. The dramatic expansion and contraction of the central circular mask suggest a highly sensitive audio gating threshold mapped to bass attenuated.

entries.name: Rovastar + Fvese - Mosaic Waves
entries.author: Rovastar + Fvese
entries.technical_notes: Custom waves render as dotted, organic filaments reacting directly to the mid and treble frequencies of the synthetic test signal. A per-pixel warp shader drives a twisting, liquid-like feedback loop using sampler_main with moderate decay, creating persistent, textured trails. Sudden shifts in rotation and color (transitioning from magenta to green) are gated by the bass transients of the test signal.

entries.name: Rovastar & Unchained - Demonology (Vampire Soul Mix)
entries.author: Rovastar & Unchained
entries.technical_notes: A central custom wave acts as a reactive vector oscilloscope, modulating in shape and brightness with the treble of the synthetic test signal. Bilateral symmetry combined with a per-pixel warp shader creates a stepped, receding tunnel effect through sampler_main feedback. High-amplitude bass kicks trigger instantaneous palette swaps and rapid zoom scaling, driving a highly kinetic, strobing architectural space.

entries.name: Rovastar & Unchained - Ambrosia Mystic (Dark Heart Mix)
entries.author: Rovastar & Unchained
entries.technical_notes: A central custom_wave oscillates with high-frequency jitter driven by the treble of the test signal, while bilateral and radial domain_repetition mirrors the visual field into a Rorschach-like structure. Per-pixel warp equations combined with frame feedback via sampler_main produce fluid, smoke-like organic trails that decay slowly. Sudden color shifts and scale expansions are gated to the bass transients of the synthetic test signal, cycling through magenta, cyan, and monochrome phases.

entries.author: Reenen & Telek

entries.name: PieturP - triptrap_(ultimate-trip-mix)
entries.author: PieturP

The per-pixel warp shader applies a kaleidoscopic domain repetition modulated by the synthetic test signal's bass transients. A rapid hue_cycle in the composite shader shifts the entire palette across vibrant neon spectrums on every major beat burst.

entries.name: Phat + Eo.S. - rainbow bubble_mid3-f. me dood
entries.author: Phat + Eo.S.
entries.technical_notes: A per-pixel warp shader drives a complex feedback loop through sampler_main, creating dense concentric wave patterns and nested tunnel structures. A rapid hue_cycle continuously rotates the palette, while the synthetic test signal modulates the warp scale and zoom parameters to trigger dramatic structural shifts. The low decay rate preserves sharp, high-frequency lines that define the boundaries of the morphing geometry.

entries.name: Phat + Eo.S. - Swim_waveform_mix
entries.author: Phat + Eo.S.

The synthetic kick in the test signal triggers sudden, violent shifts in the warp direction, causing the red and purple pigments to churn against a stark black-and-white background.

entries.name: ORB - Waaa
entries.author: ORB
entries.technical_notes: A central custom wave acts as a bright light source, casting radial rays that are modulated by the treble and mid frequencies of the test signal. High-intensity bass transients trigger full-screen color inversions and bright flashes, indicating beat-gated code modifying the background decay and gamma. A radial warp field combined with frame feedback via sampler_main creates a spinning, tunnel-like motion vector field that expands outward from the center.

entries.name: ORB - Nova Sunrise
entries.author: ORB

Discrete color shifts and rotation steps are gated directly by bass and mid-frequency thresholds.

entries.name: ORB - Fire and Fumes 2

The per-pixel warp shader introduces a subtle radial zoom and edge distortion that modulates with treble transients.

entries.author: ORB

Rapid hue cycling shifts the entire palette through vibrant primary and secondary colors on treble transients.

entries.name: Mstress & Zylot - Acid UFO

A per-pixel warp shader applies a rotational and radial distortion, blending with previous frames via sampler_main to create smooth, decaying trails.

A rapid hue cycle rotates the color palette across the spectrum against a clean, high-decay dark background.

The wave reacts to the transients of the synthetic test signal, occasionally rendering as a thin dark or orange line before disappearing back into the background. The decay rate is extremely high, leaving no persistent trails.

entries.name: Geiss - Electric Storm Half-Digital 2

The horizontal wave's amplitude and ripple modulate in response to the mid-range frequencies of the test signal, while the hue cycles slowly through purple, blue, cyan, and white. The lack of frame_feedback or warp_field results in zero persistent trails, creating a clean, sparse aesthetic.

entries.name: Geiss - Electric Storm Half-Digital 2 (Fiesta Mix)

The wave's vertical displacement is gated by the mid and treble frequencies of the synthetic test signal. With no frame feedback and an instantaneous decay, the visual remains extremely sparse while hue_cycle slowly rotates the line's color.

Sudden state transitions and color shifts are gated by the bass transients of the synthetic test signal.

A sudden transition at 00:10 temporarily clears the feedback buffer, leaving high-contrast shapes against a dark void before resuming the dense, hue-cycled feedback loop.

entries.name: Flexi - self-lubricating

The visibility and geometry of these shapes are gated directly by the bass threshold of the music, resulting in a stark stroboscopic effect. No frame feedback or warp shaders are active, leaving only raw, instantaneous state changes.

The ribbon's rotation, scale, and deformation are modulated by the music's bass and mid bands, while the lack of frame feedback through sampler_main results in a perfectly clean, high-contrast render against a solid black background.

There are no spatial warp fields, custom waves, or feedback samplers active, resulting in a completely flat, minimalist strobe effect. The color transitions are driven by audio gating on the bass threshold, cycling through a wide gamut of highly saturated hues.
